steps.assistant_content_head:
I'll build a responsive events calendar interface for CityHub according to the specifications.

First, I'll create the HTML file with all the required elements, styling, and JavaScript functionality.

tool_calls.name: write_file
tool_calls.content_head:
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
    <title>CityHub Events</title>
    <link href="https://

steps.assistant_content_head: I need to continue implementing the JavaScript functionality to make the calendar interactive. I'll add the remaining code to handle view toggling, navigation, and event positioning in the week view.
